arts.ttl: How to watch Fulham vs Arsenal: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: London derby as Gunners look to continue fine form

arts.ttl: 'I jumped on plane to go to Arsenal and loved boss - but I feel more connected to Fulham'
arts.sum: Luis Boa Morte was plucked from obscurity in Portugal to join Arsenal in 1997 - but it was his move to Fulham two years later that changed everything for the winger

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'closely monitoring' Brazilian teenager amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Arsenal's trip to Craven Cottage will see the team face off against former team-mate Emile Smith Rowe, who has become a key player under new boss Marco Silva this season

arts.ttl: Three things spotted in Arsenal training ahead of Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal are back in Premier League action on Sunday afternoon as they look to make it four league wins in a row when they travel to Craven Cottage to take on Fulham (2pm kick-off). Ahead of the match Arteta has been working on the training pitch with his squad.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Fulham: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal looks to get back to winning ways at Craven Cottage after dropping five points to Fulham last season.

arts.ttl: William Saliba hands Arsenal major boost as Gunners star speaks out on his future - amid links to Spanish giants Real Madrid
arts.sum: Saliba's impressive performances for Arsenal have reportedly drawn the attention of Real Madrid, with the Spanish giants said to have made the defender one of their key transfer targets.

arts.ttl: Arsenal are the set-piece masters but here is how Fulham can avoid making the same basic errors as the Gunners' rivals, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Set-pieces are fashionable again thanks to Arsenal. You have to admire the delivery but their success this season is also due to opposition defenders not doing the basics.

arts.ttl: William Saliba pledges future to Arsenal as Liverpool fired Premier League title warning
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: William Saliba, speaking as part of an inspiring community visit to a local primary school in Islington, has revealed he hopes to stay at Arsenal for a long time ahead of Sunday's trip to Fulham in a welcome boost for Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Arsenal copy clever Chelsea transfer plan as Mikel Arteta targets Estevao Willian teammate
arts.sum: As quoted by Goal, Reis has said: "Everybody wants to play in Europe, but my mind is 100 percent with Palmeiras. Regardless of whether the duo guide the Brazilian club to glory, Arsenal can be confident that Reis could be just as good of a signing as Estevao for Chelsea.
